allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(s['projectName'],'/',s['name'],'->',s.get\('source',{}\).get\('repo','\(no git\)'\),'branch=',s.get\('source',{}\).get\('ref','?'\)\) for s in d['result']['data']['json']['services'] if s['projectName']=='outros']")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); j=d['result']['data']['json']; print\('SOURCE:', j.get\('source'\)\); print\('---ENV---'\); print\(j.get\('env',''\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); j=d['result']['data']['json']; print\('SOURCE:', j.get\('source'\)\); print\('DOMAINS:', [x.get\('host'\) for x in j.get\('domains',[]\)]\); print\('---ENV---'\); print\(j.get\('env',''\)\)")
